debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
i : ℕ
h : i < w
h' : ¬args[i] = 0
h'' : ¬args[i] = 1
⊢ Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.assert_bits_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args cs) = denotation.n

failed_attempts:
simp only [List.foldl_append, List.foldl_cons]
  have h_n : ∀ {l' : List (ZMod p)} {cs'}, Cs.eval p inst✝ cs' = .n → (l'.foldl assert_bit_e cs').eval = .n := by
    intro l'; induction l' with
    | nil => intros; assumption
    | cons x xs ih =>
      intros cs' hcs'; simp only [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih
      simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, hcs']; split <;> rfl
  apply h_n
  simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval]
  split
  · rename_i h_cond
    simp [l, Vector.get_eq_getElem, mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at h_cond
    cases h_cond <;> contradiction
  · rfl

induction w generalizing i args cs with
  | zero => exact Nat.not_lt_zero i h
  | succ w ih =>
    obtain ⟨v, vs⟩ := Vector.exists_eq_cons args
    subst args
    rw [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl_cons]
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      have h_fail : (assert_bit_e cs v).eval = .n := by
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero]
        simp at h' h''; exact ⟨h', h''⟩
      have h_all_n : ∀ {w} (vs : Vector (ZMod p) w) {cs : Cs p (ZMod p)}, cs.eval = .n → (assert_bits_e vs cs).eval = .n := by
        intro w vs; induction vs using Vector.inductionOn with
        | nil => intros; simp [assert_bits_e, *]
        | cons v vs ih => intros; rw [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl_cons]; apply ih; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, *]
      apply h_all_n vs h_fail
    | succ i =>
      apply ih (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) (by simpa using h') (by simpa using h'')

end Clap

| zero => cases h
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_decomp : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j hj; match j with | .zero => simp | .succ j => simp [add_comm]
    rw [h_decomp] at h' h'' h ⊢
    unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl at ih ⊢
    simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract,
      List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, Array.size_extract,
      Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
      Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil] at h' h'' h ⊢
    match i with
    | 0 =>
      simp at h' h''
      have h₀ : (assert_bit_e cs args.head).eval = .n := by
        unfold assert_bit_e Cs.eval Exp.eval; simp [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero, h', h'']
      induction args.tail.toList generalizing cs with
      | nil => exact h₀
      | cons x xs ih' =>
        simp only [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih'; unfold assert_bit_e Cs.eval; simp [h₀]
    | j+1 =>
      simp at h' h'' h
      apply ih j args.tail (assert_bit_e cs args.head) h h' h''

| zero => exact (Nat.not_lt_zero i h).elim
  | succ w ih =>
    rw [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl_cons]
    by_cases hi : i = 0
    · subst hi; rw [Cs.eval, assert_bit_e]
      have h_cond : (Exp.v args[0] * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args[0])).eval ≠ 0 := by
        unfold Exp.eval; intro h_z; rcases mul_eq_zero.1 h_z with h1 | h2
        · exact h' h1
        · exact h'' (sub_eq_zero.1 h2).symm
      simp [h_cond]
      have n_eval : ∀ {w} (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) {s : Cs p (ZMod p)}, s.eval = .n → (assert_bits_e args s).eval = .n := by
        intro w args; induction w with
        | zero => intros s hs; exact hs
        | succ w ih => intros s hs; rw [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl_cons]; apply ih; rw [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]; split <;> simp [hs]
      apply n_eval; rw [Cs.eval]; simp [h_cond]
    · apply ih (i - 1) (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h)
      · rwa [Vector.getElem_tail args (i - 1) (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h)] at h'
      · rwa [Vector.getElem_tail args (i - 1) (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h)] at h''

| zero => cases h
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_eq : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j hj; match j with | 0 => simp | j+1 => simp
    rw [h_eq] at h' h'' ⊢; unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
    simp only [Vector.toArray_insertIdx, Array.insertIdx_zero, List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons]
    by_cases hi : i = 0
    · subst hi; rw [Cs.eval]; simp [h', h'', mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero]
      generalize h_cs : (Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs) = cs'
      have h_n : cs'.eval = .n := by rw [←h_cs]; simp [Cs.eval, h', h'', mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero]
      clear h' h'' h_eq h hi h_cs; induction w generalizing args cs' with
      | zero => simp [Vector.foldl, h_n]
      | succ w ih' => rw [Vector.foldl]; simp only [List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons]; apply ih'; simp [Cs.eval, h_n]
    · apply ih (i - 1) (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ (by rwa [Nat.succ_pred hi]))
      · simpa [hi] using h'
      · simpa [hi] using h''

rw [Array.foldl_eq_foldl_data]
  have h_nz : args[i] * (1 - args[i]) ≠ 0 := by
    intro h₀
    rcases mul_eq_zero.mp h₀ with h₁ | h₁
    · exact h' h₁
    · rw [sub_eq_zero] at h₁; exact h'' h₁
  have h_eval : ∀ (l : List (ZMod p)) (init : Cs p (ZMod p)),
      (eval init = .n ∨ ∃ x ∈ l, x * (1 - x) ≠ 0) → eval (l.foldl assert_bit_e init) = .n := by
    intro l; induction l with
    | nil => intro init h; rcases h with he | ⟨x, hm, _⟩; exact he; contradiction
    | cons b l ih =>
      intro init h; simp [List.foldl] at h ⊢; apply ih
      rcases h with he | hb | hl
      · left; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, he]; split_ifs <;> rfl
      · left; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, hb]
      · right; exact hl
  apply h_eval; right; use args[i]; simp [h_nz, List.mem_iff_get]; use ⟨i, h⟩

| zero => contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    let b := args.head; let bs := args.tail
    have h_step : assert_bits_e args cs = assert_bits_e bs (assert_bit_e cs b) := by
      unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl; simp [←Vector.cons_head_tail args, List.foldl_cons]
    rw [h_step]
    rcases i with - | j
    · have h_n : (assert_bit_e cs b).eval = .n := by
        unfold assert_bit_e Cs.eval Exp.eval; simp at h' h''
        split_ifs with h_eq
        · cases mul_eq_zero.mp h_eq <;> (simp [sub_eq_zero] at *; contradiction)
        · rfl
      clear h h' h'' ih
      induction w generalizing bs cs with
      | zero => unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl; simp [h_n]
      | succ w ih2 =>
        rw [show assert_bits_e bs cs = assert_bits_e bs.tail (assert_bit_e cs bs.head) from by
          unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl; simp [←Vector.cons_head_tail bs, List.foldl_cons]]
        apply ih2; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h_n]; split_ifs <;> rfl
    · exact ih j bs (assert_bit_e cs b) (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''

| zero => linarith
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_a : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j hj; match j with | .zero => simp; rfl | .succ j => simp [add_comm]
    rw [h_a] at *; unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl at *
    simp only [Vector.toArray_insertIdx, Array.insertIdx_zero, Array.size_toArray, List.length_cons,
      List.length_nil, zero_add, Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil] at *
    match i with
    | 0 =>
      have h_h : args.head * (1 - args.head) = 0 → False := by
        simp [Exp.eval] at *; intro h_z; rcases mul_eq_zero.mp h_z with hz | hz
        · exact h' hz
        · rw [sub_eq_zero] at hz; exact h'' hz.symm
      rw [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, if_neg h_h]
      have h_n : ∀ {w : ℕ} {args : Vector (ZMod p) w} {cs : Cs p (ZMod p)},
        cs.eval = .n → (assert_bits_e args cs).eval = .n := by
        intro w args cs hn; induction w generalizing cs with
        | zero => simp [assert_bits_e, hn]
        | succ w ih' =>
          have h_a' : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
            simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j hj; match j with | .zero => simp; rfl | .succ j => simp [add_comm]
          rw [h_a']; unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
          simp only [Vector.toArray_insertIdx, Array.insertIdx_zero, Array.size_toArray, List.length_cons,
            List.length_nil, zero_add, Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
          rw [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, hn]; split <;> [apply ih'; rfl]
      apply h_n; rfl
    | i + 1 =>
      apply ih i (assert_bit_e cs args.head) (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''

| zero => exact (Nat.not_lt_zero i h).elim
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_n : ∀ {w'} (v : Vector (ZMod p) w') {cs'}, cs'.eval = denotation.n → (Vector.foldl assert_bit_e cs' v).eval = denotation.n := by
      intro w' v cs' he; induction w' generalizing cs' with
      | zero => simp [Vector.foldl, he]
      | succ w' ih' =>
        rw [Vector.cons_head_tail v]
        simp [Vector.foldl, Vector.toList_cons, List.foldl_cons, Cs.eval, he, ih']
    unfold assert_bits_e
    rw [Vector.cons_head_tail args]
    simp only [Vector.foldl, Vector.toList_cons, List.foldl_cons]
    by_cases hi : i = 0
    · subst hi; apply h_n
      simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero, h', h'']
    · apply ih (i - 1) (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ (by rwa [Nat.succ_pred hi]))
      · rwa [Vector.get_tail, Nat.succ_pred hi]
      · rwa [Vector.get_tail, Nat.succ_pred hi]

| zero => exact (Nat.not_lt_zero _ h).elim
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_cons : ∀ {w} {tail : Vector (ZMod p) w} {head} {cs},
      assert_bits_e (Vector.insertIdx tail 0 head) cs = assert_bits_e tail (assert_bit_e cs head) := by
      intros; unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl;
      simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_append,
        List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, Array.size_extract,
        Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
        Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
    have h_n : ∀ {w} {args : Vector (ZMod p) w} {cs},
      cs.eval = .n → (assert_bits_e args cs).eval = .n := by
      intro w args; induction w with
      | zero => intros; simp [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, List.foldl_toArray']
      | succ w ih' => intros cs hcs; rw [h_cons]; apply ih'; rw [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]; split <;> [assumption, rfl]
    have h_args : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j hj; match j with | 0 => simp | j + 1 => simp
    rw [h_args] at h' h'' ⊢; rw [h_cons]
    simp only [Vector.getElem_insertIdx_zero, Vector.getElem_insertIdx_succ] at h' h''
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      apply h_n; rw [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval]
      have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h_z; rcases ZMod.mul_eq_zero_iff.1 h_z with hz | hz
        · exact h' hz
        · exact h'' (sub_eq_zero.1 hz).symm
      simp [this]
    | succ i =>
      apply ih (i := i) (h := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''

| zero => cases i; contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    rw [← Vector.cons_head_tail args]
    simp only [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, Array.foldl_cons, List.foldl_cons]
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      simp only [Vector.getElem_cons_zero] at h' h''
      have h_n : (assert_bit_e cs args.head).eval = .n := by
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero, h', h'']
      clear h h' h'' ih
      induction w genericizing args cs with
      | zero => simp [Vector.foldl, h_n]
      | succ w ih =>
        rw [← Vector.cons_head_tail args]
        simp only [Vector.foldl, Array.foldl_cons, List.foldl_cons]
        apply ih; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h_n]
    | succ i =>
      simp only [Vector.getElem_cons_succ] at h' h''
      apply ih (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''

by_contra h_eval
  induction w generalizing i cs args with
  | zero => exact (Nat.not_lt_zero i h).elim
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_cons : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
      ext j hj; match j with | .zero => simp | .succ j => simp [add_comm]
    rw [h_cons] at h h' h'' h_eval
    unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl at h_eval
    simp only [Vector.toArray_insertIdx, Vector.toArray_tail, Array.insertIdx_zero, Array.foldl_cons, List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_toArray'] at h_eval
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      have h_f : ∀ {c l}, (List.foldl assert_bit_e c l).eval ≠ denotation.n → c.eval ≠ denotation.n := by
        intro c l; induction l generalizing c with
        | nil => simp
        | cons b l ih' =>
          intro h_l; apply ih'
          simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval] at h_l; split at h_l <;> [assumption; contradiction]
      have := h_f h_eval
      simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval] at this
      split at this
      · cases mul_eq_zero.1 (by assumption)
        · exact h' ‹_›
        · exact h'' (by rw [sub_eq_zero] at *; assumption)
      · contradiction
    | succ i =>
      simp at h
      apply ih i (assert_bit_e cs args.head) args.tail h h' h''
      unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
      simp only [List.foldl_toArray', Vector.toArray_tail]
      exact h_eval

induction w generalizing i args cs with
  | zero => contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    simp [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval]
    split_ifs with hb
    · cases i with
      | zero =>
        simp [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at hb
        rcases hb with hb | hb <;> contradiction
      | succ i =>
        exact ih i args.tail (assert_bit_e cs args.head) (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''
    · rfl

induction w generalizing cs i args with
  | zero => exact (Nat.not_lt_zero i h).elim
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_decomp : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j hj; cases j <;> simp
    rw [h_decomp] at h ⊢; unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
    simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_append,
      List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, Array.size_extract,
      Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
      Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      have : args[0] = args.head := by rw [h_decomp]; simp
      rw [this] at h' h''; have h_eval : (Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs).eval = .n := by
        simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero]; rintro (hz | ho) <;> contradiction
      have h_n : ∀ {w} (bs : Vector (ZMod p) w) c, c.eval = .n → (Array.foldl assert_bit_e c bs.toArray).eval = .n := by
        intro w' bs; induction w' with
        | zero => intros c he; have : bs.toArray = #[] := by ext j; exact (Nat.not_lt_zero _ j.2).elim
                  rw [this, Array.foldl_nil]; exact he
        | succ w' ih' => intros c he; have h_d : bs = Vector.insertIdx bs.tail 0 bs.head := by
            simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j hj; cases j <;> simp
          rw [h_d]; simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_append,
            List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, Array.size_extract,
            Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
            Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
          apply ih'; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, he]
      apply h_n; exact h_eval
    | succ i =>
      have : args[i+1] = args.tail[i] := by rw [h_decomp]; simp
      rw [this] at h' h''; apply ih (i := i) (h := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''

| zero => exact (Nat.not_lt_zero i h).elim
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_args : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j; match j with | 0 => rfl | j + 1 => rfl
    rw [h_args] at *; unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl at *; simp at *
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      simp at h' h''; have h_n : (assert_bit_e cs args.head).eval = .n := by
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]; intro hz; cases mul_eq_zero.1 hz <;> [exact h'; exact h'' (sub_eq_zero.1 ‹_›).symm]
      clear h' h'' ih; induction w generalizing args.tail with
      | zero => exact h_n
      | succ w ih =>
        have h_tail : args.tail = Vector.insertIdx args.tail.tail 0 args.tail.head := by
          simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j; match j with | 0 => rfl | j + 1 => rfl
        rw [h_tail]; unfold Vector.foldl; simp at *; rw [←ih]; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h_n]
    | succ i =>
      apply ih i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''

unfold assert_bits_e
  rw [Vector.foldl_eq_toList_foldl]
  have h_split : args.toList = args.toList.take i ++ args.toList.get ⟨i, h⟩ :: args.toList.drop (i + 1) := by
    nth_rw 1 [← List.take_append_drop i args.toList]
    rw [List.drop_eq_get_cons h]
  rw [h_split, List.foldl_append, List.foldl_cons]
  have hb : args[i] * (1 - args[i]) ≠ 0 := by
    intro hb
    cases mul_eq_zero.mp hb with
    | inl h0 => exact h' h0
    | inr h1 => exact h'' (sub_eq_zero.mp h1).symm
  generalize h_res_expr : assert_bit_e (List.foldl assert_bit_e cs (args.toList.take i)) (args.toList.get ⟨i, h⟩) = res
  have hres : res.eval = .n := by
    rw [← h_res_expr]
    simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, hb]
  generalize List.drop (i + 1) args.toList = l
  induction l generalizing res with
  | nil => exact hres
  | cons b bs ih =>
    apply ih
    simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, hres]

induction w generalizing i cs args with
  | zero => contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    rw [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl_cons]
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      have h_eval : (assert_bit_e cs args.head).eval = .n := by
        unfold assert_bit_e Cs.eval Exp.eval; split_ifs with hz
        · rcases mul_eq_zero.mp hz with h_z | h_o
          · exact (h' h_z).elim
          · rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_o; exact (h'' h_o).elim
        · rfl
      let tail := args.tail; clear h h' h'' ih args
      induction w generalizing cs tail with
      | zero => rw [Vector.eq_nil tail, Vector.foldl_nil, h_eval]
      | succ w ih =>
        rw [Vector.foldl_cons]; apply ih (assert_bit_e cs tail.head) tail.tail;
        unfold assert_bit_e Cs.eval; split_ifs; exact h_eval; rfl
    | succ i =>
      apply ih i (assert_bit_e cs args.head) args.tail (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''

| zero => cases h
  | succ w ih =>
    rw [←Vector.cons_head_tail args] at h h' h'' ⊢
    simp only [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, Array.foldl_eq_foldl_toList, Vector.toList_cons, List.foldl_cons, ←Vector.foldl]
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      simp at h' h''
      have hn : ∀ {w} (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) cs, cs.eval = .n → (assert_bits_e args cs).eval = .n := by
        intro w args; induction w with
        | zero => intros; simp [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, *]
        | succ w ih' =>
          intros; rw [←Vector.cons_head_tail args]
          simp [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, Array.foldl_eq_foldl_toList, List.foldl_cons, ←Vector.foldl]
          apply ih'; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, *]
      exact hn _ _ (by simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero, h', h''])
    | succ i =>
      exact ih i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) (by simpa using h') (by simpa using h'')

| zero => exact (Nat.not_lt_zero i h).elim
  | succ w ih =>
    rw [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl_cons]
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      have h_nz : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        simp [ZMod.mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero, ← Vector.get_zero_eq_head]
        rintro (rfl | rfl) <;> contradiction
      have h_eval_n : ∀ {w : ℕ} (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (c : Cs p (ZMod p)),
          c.eval = .n → (assert_bits_e args c).eval = .n := by
        intro w; induction w <;> intros
        · simp [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl_nil, *]
        · rw [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl_cons]; apply_assumption; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, *]
      apply h_eval_n; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h_nz]
    | succ i =>
      apply ih args.tail (assert_bit_e cs args.head) i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''

induction w generalizing i cs args with
  | zero => contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_args : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by ext j; cases j <;> simp
    rw [h_args]; unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
    simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_append,
      List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, Array.size_extract,
      Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
      Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      have h_eval : (assert_bit_e cs args.head).eval = .n := by
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval]
        intro h_zero
        haveI : Field (ZMod p) := ZMod.instField p
        cases Field.mul_eq_zero.mp h_zero with
        | inl hz => exact h' hz
        | inr hz => rw [sub_eq_zero] at hz; exact h'' hz
      induction w generalizing args with
      | zero => unfold Vector.foldl; simp [h_eval]
      | succ w ih =>
        simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_append,
          List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, Array.size_extract,
          Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
          Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
        apply ih; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h_eval]
    | succ i =>
      apply ih args.tail (assert_bit_e cs args.head) i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''

end Clap

| zero => exfalso; exact Nat.not_lt_zero i h
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_v : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext i h; match i with | .zero => simp | .succ i => simp [add_comm]
    rw [h_v] at *; rw [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl]
    simp only [Vector.toArray_insertIdx, Array.insertIdx_zero, List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons]
    match i with
    | 0 =>
      have h_h : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h_eq; simp [sub_eq_zero] at h_eq; cases h_eq <;> [apply h'; apply h''] <;> assumption
      have h_n : (assert_bit_e cs args.head).eval = denotation.n := by simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h_h]
      rw [h_n]; clear h ih; induction args.tail.toArray.toList with
      | nil => rfl
      | cons x xs ih_tail => simp only [List.foldl_cons, Cs.eval]; split <;> [exact ih_tail; rfl]
    | j + 1 =>
      rw [←List.foldl_toArray', ←Vector.foldl, ←assert_bits_e]
      apply ih j (assert_bit_e cs args.head) args.tail (by simp at h; exact h) <;>
      simp at h' h'' <;> assumption

simp [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, Array.foldl_eq_foldl_toList]
  have hm : args[i] ∈ args.toArray.toList := by simp; exists i
  induction args.toArray.toList generalizing cs with
  | nil => cases hm
  | cons x xs ih =>
    simp at hm; rcases hm with rfl | hm
    · simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero, h', h'']
      apply h_n
    · simp [assert_bit_e, ih hm]

| zero => exact (Nat.not_lt_zero i h).elim
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_args : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j hj; match j with | 0 => simp | j+1 => simp [add_comm]
    rw [h_args] at h' h'' ⊢; unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl at *
    simp only [Vector.toArray_insertIdx, List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons] at *
    rcases i with _|i
    · have h_ev : (Cs.eval p inst✝ (Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs)) = denotation.n := by
        simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, ZMod.mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero, h', h'']
      clear h h' h'' ih h_args; let l := args.tail.toArray.toList
      induction l generalizing cs with
      | nil => exact h_ev
      | cons x xs ih' => simp only [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih'; simp [Cs.eval, h_ev]
    · exact ih i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''

| zero => contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_args : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j hj; match j with | .zero => simp | .succ j => simp [add_comm]
    rw [h_args] at *; unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl at *
    simp only [Vector.toArray_insertIdx, Array.insertIdx_zero, Array.foldl_eq_foldl_toList, List.foldl_cons, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval] at *
    by_cases hi : i = 0
    · subst hi; simp [h', h'', mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero]
      clear i h h' h'' cs ih h_args; induction w with | zero => rfl | succ w ih =>
        simp only [Array.foldl_eq_foldl_toList, Vector.toArray_tail, Vector.toList_mk, List.foldl_cons, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]; split_ifs <;> [apply ih, rfl]
    · rw [ih (i - 1) args.tail (assert_bit_e cs args.head) (by omega)]
      · split_ifs <;> rfl
      · simp [Vector.getElem_tail, hi]; exact h'
      · simp [Vector.getElem_tail, hi]; exact h''

| zero => contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_args : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext k hk; match k with | 0 => simp | k+1 => simp [add_comm, Vector.get_tail]
    rw [h_args]; unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
    simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_append,
      List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, Array.size_extract,
      Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
      Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
    have prop : ∀ {w} (bs : Vector (ZMod p) w) cs, (Cs.eval cs) = .n → (assert_bits_e bs cs).eval = .n := by
      intro w; induction w with
      | zero => intros; rfl
      | succ w ih =>
        intros bs cs h
        have h_bs : bs = Vector.insertIdx bs.tail 0 bs.head := by
          simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext k hk; match k with | 0 => simp | k+1 => simp [add_comm, Vector.get_tail]
        rw [h_bs]; unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
        simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_append,
          List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, Array.size_extract,
          Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
          Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
        apply ih; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h]
    match i with
    | 0 =>
      apply prop
      simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval]
      intro h; rw [mul_eq_zero] at h
      rcases h with h | h
      · exact h' h
      · exact h'' (sub_eq_zero.1 h).symm
    | j + 1 =>
      apply ih (i := j) (h := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h)
      · exact h'
      · exact h''
simpa [assert_bit_e, eval, mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero, h', h'']

induction args using Vector.inductionOn generalizing i cs with
  | nil => contradiction
  | cons head tail ih =>
    rw [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl_cons]
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      have h_eval : (assert_bit_e cs head).eval = .n := by
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero, mul_eq_zero, h', h'']
        intro h_eq; cases h_eq <;> contradiction
      induction tail using Vector.inductionOn generalizing cs with
      | nil => rw [Vector.foldl_nil]; exact h_eval
      | cons _ _ ih' => rw [Vector.foldl_cons]; apply ih'; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h_eval]
    | succ i =>
      rw [←assert_bits_e]
      apply ih i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''

| zero => exfalso; exact Nat.not_lt_zero i h
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_v : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j hj; match j with | .zero => simp | .succ j => simp [add_comm]
    rw [h_v] at h' h'' ⊢
    unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl at ih ⊢
    simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract, List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      have h_n : (Cs.eval (assert_bit_e cs args.head)) = denotation.n := by
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
        have : args.head * (1 - args.head) = 0 → False := by
          intro hz; rcases mul_eq_zero.mp hz with hz1 | hz2
          · exact h' hz1
          · simp [sub_eq_zero] at hz2; exact h'' hz2
        simp [this]
      clear h h' h'' h_v ih
      generalize h_cs' : (assert_bit_e cs args.head) = cs'
      have : cs'.eval = denotation.n := by rw [←h_cs']; exact h_n
      induction (Vector.tail args).toArray.toList generalizing cs' with
      | nil => exact this
      | cons x xs ih' =>
        simp only [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih'
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, this]
    | succ i =>
      apply ih (assert_bit_e cs args.head) i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) (by simpa using h') (by simpa using h'')

| zero => contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_d : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j hj; match j with | 0 => simp | j+1 => simp
    rw [h_d] at h' h'' ⊢; unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
    simp only [Vector.toArray_insertIdx, Array.foldl_insertIdx_zero, Vector.toArray_tail,
      Vector.getElem_insertIdx_zero, Vector.getElem_insertIdx_succ] at h' h'' ⊢
    match i with
    | 0 =>
      simp at h' h''
      have h_n : ∀ as cs, cs.eval = .n → (Array.foldl assert_bit_e cs as).eval = .n := by
        intro as cs hcs; induction as using Array.induction_right
        case empty => assumption
        case push as a ih' => rw [Array.foldl_push, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, ih']; split <;> [assumption; rfl]
      apply h_n; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero, h', h'']
    | j + 1 => exact ih j args.tail (assert_bit_e cs args.head) (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''

induction w generalizing i cs with
  | zero => contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_split : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j hj; cases j <;> simp
    rw [h_split] at h' h'' ⊢; unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
    simp only [Vector.toArray_insertIdx, Array.foldl_insertIdx, List.foldl_cons]
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      simp at h' h''; have h_n : (assert_bit_e cs args.head).eval = .n := by
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]; intro h0; rcases mul_eq_zero.1 h0 with h|h
        · exact h' h
        · exact h'' (sub_eq_zero.1 h)
      clear h h' h'' ih; induction w generalizing cs with
      | zero => simp [Vector.foldl, h_n]
      | succ w ih =>
        unfold Vector.foldl; simp [ih, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, h_n]
    | succ i =>
      apply ih i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h)
      · simp at h'; exact h'
      · simp at h''; exact h''

induction w with
  | zero => intros i h; exact (Nat.not_lt_zero i h).elim
  | succ w ih =>
    intros args cs i hi h0 h1
    have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext j hj; match j with | 0 => rfl | j+1 => rfl
    rw [this] at hi h0 h1 ⊢
    unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
    simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_append,
      List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, Array.size_extract,
      Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
      Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
    match i with
    | 0 =>
      have : (assert_bit_e cs args.head).eval = denotation.n := by
        simp only [Vector.getElem_insertIdx_zero] at h0 h1
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero, h0, h1]
      if hb : assert_bits args.tail then rw [reduce₁ hb, this]
      else
        unfold assert_bits at hb
        simp [Vector.all_eq_true, Bool.not_or, beq_iff_eq, decide_eq_true_eq] at hb
        rcases hb with ⟨j, hj0, hj1⟩
        apply ih _ _ j j.2 hj0 hj1
    | i + 1 =>
      apply ih _ _ i (by simpa using hi) (by simpa using h0) (by simpa using h1)

simp only [List.foldl_toArray']
  generalize args.toList = l at *
  induction l generalizing cs with
  | nil => cases hb_in
  | cons x xs ih =>
    simp at hb_in; rcases hb_in with rfl | hb_in
    · apply n_foldl; simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval, hb_nz]
    · exact ih _ hb_in
